reasoning: The gem_emerald_v00 is visible against the dark background and the green/teal hues contrast reasonably with the navy-grey scene tiles. The red arrow marks it clearly in the composite. However the asset renders at roughly 48x48px, making the silhouette appear pixelated and detail-poor; at a glance it could be confused with a small character sprite or environmental decoration rather than a collectible gem. The green tones are distinct from the gold UI elements and blue joystick, so hue confusion is low. Dark-area visibility is adequate — the bright green facets catch attention on the near-black background. The pasted composite looks slightly aliased at the edges compared to the native UI elements, suggesting the asset resolution or blending mode is mismatched. Overall it clears the minimum readability bar but falls short of the clean, polished Echoes aesthetic that warrants a pass.
